_comment: jscpd 5.x is the Rust `cpd` rewrite. It reads this config but RENAMED the old `ignore` key to `ignorePattern` (matching its --ignore-pattern flag); an `ignore` array is silently not read. The schemastore $schema describes the old config shape, so it is intentionally omitted. See IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES 'jscpd 5.x renamed the config ignore key to ignorePattern'.
